title: [v5.4] Fix HealthCheck log destination, count, and size defaults
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #25520

/assign Luap99

```release-note
Fixed a bug where the default values of the HealthCheck logs were not set correctly, causing the logs to have no restrictions.
```
